title: Autopilot mode is live — your Twitter account now runs itself
excerpt: What autopilot mode actually does and how to turn it on with the 1 hour undo window.
content:
## What Autopilot Mode Actually Does
It removes the need to even approve. It generates, schedules, and posts behind the scenes.

## The 1 Hour Undo Window
We never want to break your trust. You have a full 1 hour window to undo/edit a finalized post before it's submitted to Twitter.

## Real Example
Here's what an autopilot account looks like after a week.

[Turn on autopilot — takes 30 seconds](/dashboard/settings)

seo.metaDescription: Your Twitter account now runs itself with Autopilot mode.
